reviews.comment:
De viaje cargue diesel infinia , a los pocos km la camioneta me empezó a fallar, pistones, poca fuerza, tirones... Tuve q hacer 700 km para cargar en una axión y ahí empezo a funcionar bien el auto,. No sé que me cargaron ... Poco recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
On a trip, I filled up with Infinia diesel. After only a few kilometers, the truck started having problems: piston issues, lack of power, jerking... I had to drive 700 km to fill up at an Axion station, and then the car started running properly. I don't know what they put in it... Not recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbjlUQ1Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos y estaba descargando el camión, habían conos y/o vallas en todas las islas MENOS en una, y nadie haciendo fila. Pasamos sabiendo que tendríamos que esperar la descarga pero como al avanzar nadie nos frenó, supusimos que podíamos esperar en la isla directamente. Un playero se nos acercó a decirnos que teníamos que esperar "detrás de la línea" (que no se veía ninguna) aunque le dijimos que no había cono ni valla y pensamos que podíamos adelantarnos, que debíamos "hacer fila" cuando le aclaramos que no había nadie en la fila. Detrás nuestro entró otro vehículo justamente por no tenerlo bien señalizado y le obligaron a dar la vuelta a la manzana para esperar igual que a nosotras. Además no tienen funcionando la app de YPF, y no nos dejaron lavar nuestros propios vidrios (el playero nos pidió él el limpiavidrios para lavarlos él).

(Translated by Google)
We went and the truck was unloading. There were cones and/or fences on every island EXCEPT one, and no one was in line. We went through knowing we'd have to wait for the unloading, but since no one stopped us as we moved forward, we assumed we could wait right on the island. A beach attendant approached us to tell us we had to wait "behind the line" (which wasn't visible), although we told him there were no cones or fences and thought we could go ahead and "get in line" when we clarified there was no one in line. Another vehicle entered behind us precisely because it wasn't properly marked, and they forced them to go around the block to wait just like us. Furthermore, they don't have the YPF app working, and they didn't let us wash our own windows (the beach attendant asked us for the window cleaner to clean them himself).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaDkyUEhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Les faltaría entrega de dinero! Ayudaría mucho a la gente porque si no hay plata en los cajeros dependes solo de la anonima 🙏🏼

(Translated by Google)
They need to distribute cash! It would help people a lot because if there's no money in the ATMs, you're completely dependent on anonymous donations 🙏🏼

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The YPF app hasn't worked for 38 days, and the air conditioning isn't working either. The bathrooms could be better.

reviews.comment:

No app... no receipt or tickets. The hacking excuse has been around for over a month. Come up with something else.

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio en playa. Lástima que no poseían en funcionamiento la app y los puntos de ypf, porque nos perdimos de sumar puntos para los beneficios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the beach. It's a shame they didn't have the YPF app and points system working, because we missed out on earning points for benefits.
